issue_title: Some styles (border) don't work in render props
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**

When using `<View render={() => /* */} />`, the rendered components fail to apply certain styles such as border. Font-size still works however.

**To Reproduce**

Create a component with styles such as border, padding, margin. Render this component directly in the Documen
test_description_zh: 在 react-pdf 文档中，使用 <View render={() => ...} /> 渲染属性方式创建一个包含 border、padding、margin 等样式的组件，观察渲染结果中这些样式是否正确应用。
expected_result_zh: 通过 render props 方式渲染的组件应正确显示 border、padding、margin 等样式，与直接作为子组件渲染时的效果一致。
